nodes.name: Spot-billed ground tyrant
nodes.summary: Spot-billed ground tyrant（Spot-billed ground tyrant，学名 Muscisaxicola maculirostris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联12个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 因巴布拉省
nodes.summary: 因巴布拉省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联6种鸟类，包括黑脚毛腿蜂鸟、大绿金刚鹦鹉、Red-ruffed fruitcrow等6种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 阿雷基帕
nodes.summary: 阿雷基帕是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Spot-billed ground tyrant，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The spot-billed ground tyrant (Muscisaxicola maculirostris) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Bolivia, Chile, Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru and as a vagrant in Brazil.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the Andes from southern Amazonas and Cajamarca departments in northern Peru south through the rest of the country, reaching the coast in the southern part of the country

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: rufescens is found in the Andes of Ecuador from Imbabura Province south to Chimborazo Province and perhaps further south

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: There are is a record in far southern Colombia. In addition, the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society has records of vagrants of the species in Brazil. The spot-billed ground tyrant inhabits a variety of landscapes, all of which are sparsely vegetated and often rocky
